title: 10 best herbal teas for bunion
description: Goldenseal teas helps with bunion because it contains berberine, a natural compound that reduces inflammation and alleviates pain. The anti-inflammatory properties of goldenseal also help to reduce swelling in the affected area, which can be especially beneficial for individuals experiencing discomfort or stiffness due to bunions.
